side: CONTRA (devil's advocate) — the strongest case NOT to do the deal (or to walk on price)
rationale_for_ordering: Built before valuation so the contra case is argued on the facts, not reverse-engineered from a number we want to hit.
vote: DEFER — do not approve at ask; walk unless price + conditions move

strongest_points.point: 8.0x ARR for a Rule-of-40 of 31 with DECELERATING growth fails the hurdle
strongest_points.evidence: bear case (rev 50% of plan) FAILS 20% IRR at ask; only PASSES <= 6.5x ARR

strongest_points.point: The revenue synergy is gated on the SAME tech-debt the integration must fix
strongest_points.evidence: $9M cross-sell needs SSO/SCIM + multi-region; both are unfunded P1 debt

strongest_points.point: Integration is ~55% more expensive than the deal model carries
strongest_points.evidence: $7M true vs $4.5M priced; erodes synergy NPV to ~$2M in the bear case

strongest_points.point: NRR 109% sits on GRR 88% with 12%/yr logo churn — less durable than it looks
strongest_points.evidence: expansion is masking churn; win rate down 38%->34%, discount creep 9%->14%

strongest_points.point: Legal/compliance stack is material and unresolved
strongest_points.evidence: uncapped IP indemnity on top customer + 2 missing EU DPAs + unassigned contractor IP + ungoverned AI on EU data

the_one_thing_that_kills_it: We pay a platform multiple, the auth/tenancy debt slips, the cross-sell never lands, and we're left owning a decelerating mid-market asset at an enterprise price (CEO's own stated fear).
key_assumptions: Seller may not move enough on price inside the window
Top-customer (9% ARR) change-of-control consent + renewal is a real revenue cliff
Compliance remediation may not complete before close -> the gate could veto
what_would_make_this_a_clear_NO: Seller holds at >= 7.5x ARR, OR the co-founder CTO won't sign retention, OR the compliance gate comes back BLOCK on the EU AI Act / DPA exposure.
where_lenses_disagree: CEO says strategic GO; CFO/CRO/CTO say YELLOW/GAP/SHARPEN (price + integration); GC says DO-NOT-SIGN-AS-IS. The disagreement is real and is the signal: it's a yes on the asset, a no on the terms.
source: cross-eval devil's-advocate pass (must find 3 critical concerns; assume the memo's reasoning is flawed until proven otherwise) reconciled across the five independent lens verdicts
